summary: Completed comprehensive testing of service category simplification changes. All requirements successfully implemented and working correctly.

Case Studies correctly NOT in Services dropdown
Conversion Rate Optimization links to /cro route
/paid-advertising route loads with correct title 'Paid Advertising — Revium Labs'
/cro page loads with correct title 'Conversion Rate Optimization — Revium Labs'
Homepage services section heading says 'Three services' not 'Three modules'
'See how it works' button correctly links to /pricing
Footer Services section shows correct service names
Mobile navigation displays all three services correctly
